betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Polymer§f

§aManufacture synthetic plastic from petroleum gas — the key to unlocking advanced oil cracking!§f

Polymer is a type of plastic produced from petroleum-based chemical synthesis. It is the most important early product of oil refining because it is required to construct the §bCatalytic Cracking Tower§f, which vastly expands your petrochemical capabilities.

§6Production§f:
Combine the following in a §bChemical Plant§f:
§b• §e1,000mB§f §bPetroleum Gas§f
§b• §e2×§f §bCoal Powder§f
§b• §e1×§f §bFluorite§f
→ §e4×§f §bPolymer Bar§f

§bAlternative Source§f: Smelt §bPlastic Scraps§f (found through exploration) to obtain polymer without setting up oil refining.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Catalytic Cracking Tower§f: The primary gate — polymer is required to build it.
§b• §bInsulators§f: A single polymer bar can be crafted into §e8×§f Insulators, a key electronic component.
§b• Electric Tools§f: Combined with §bHigh-Speed Steel§f, polymer enables advanced electric tools.
§b• Various Machines§f: Used extensively in machine and component recipes throughout the mod.

§eTip§f: §bPetroleum Gas§f is also obtainable from §bSchist Strata§f mining. If you save polymer for the cracking tower, you can progress through early oil faster. One chemical plant cycle yields §e4×§f polymer bars.
